summary: Role 4 read-only review of behavior recall and feedback writeback plan. Reviewed user-direction memories plus OS completion docs and implementation around finish_task, record_feedback_correction, evaluate_behavior, and run_compounding_cycle. Verdict: REVISE_REQUIRED because current plan direction is correct but must explicitly add event-triggered recall ledger and answer-quality acceptance tests before P1-09 can be accepted.
decisions: Return REVISE_REQUIRED for Role 4, not AGREE.
P1-09 must require per-event behavior recall evidence with performed/skipped/not_applicable and reason fields for completion, handoff, error, and direction-change events.

Feedback writeback acceptance must prove correction capture, later Context Pack retrieval, older-memory demotion/hold when contradicted, and answer-quality behavior change, not only expected path retrieval.

Current code has record_feedback_correction, finish_task auto-growth/compounding, and behavior eval, but behavior eval is currently a retrieval proxy and compounding extracts signals from traces rather than proving event-triggered recall decisions.
next_steps: Revise OS_COMPLETION_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN P1-09 to define a durable behavior_recall_audit artifact with trigger_type, recalled_memory_paths, decision status performed/skipped/not_applicable, reason, and resulting artifact path.
Add verifier coverage that simulates completion, handoff, error, and direction-change events and fails when any recalled behavior lacks a status and reason.
Add real-vault behavior golden cases for corrections and direction changes, with an answer-quality or judge-backed metric in addition to path/term recall.
Add regression proof that contradicted older behavior memories are held, merged, or demoted after record_feedback_correction.
search_queries: record_feedback_correction evaluate_behavior behavior golden compounding recall performed skipped not_applicable
